rules.title: Suspicious Keyboard Layout Load
rules.description: Detects the keyboard preload installation with a suspicious keyboard layout, e.g. Chinese, Iranian or Vietnamese layout load in user session on systems maintained by US staff only

rules.title: Hacktool Execution - PE Metadata
rules.description: Detects the execution of different Windows based hacktools via PE metadata (company, product, etc.) even if the files have been renamed

rules.title: Hacktool Execution - Imphash
rules.description: Detects the execution of different Windows based hacktools via their import hash (imphash) even if the files have been renamed

rules.title: Renamed SysInternals DebugView Execution
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding exclusion filter
rules.description: Detects suspicious renamed SysInternals DebugView execution

rules.title: Usage of Renamed Sysinternals Tools - RegistrySet
rules.condition_summary: selection exclusion filter excluding 1 of filter_main_* excluding 1 of filter_optional_*
rules.description: Detects non-sysinternals tools setting the "accepteula" key which normally is set on sysinternals tool execution
